inputs.label: Failure Rate (λ)
inputs.businessContext: The rate at which failures occur per unit time (exponential distribution parameter)

inputs.label: Time (t)
inputs.businessContext: Time point at which to compute survival probability

inputs.label: Target Survival Probability
inputs.businessContext: Desired survival probability (between 0 and 1) to compute the required time (e.g., B10 life)

inputs.label: Observed Failures
inputs.businessContext: Observed number of failures in a test (for reference, not used in calculations)

inputs.label: Total Test Time
inputs.businessContext: Total operating time of all items under test (for reference, not used in calculations)
